name: Deployment Pipeline Test
description: A scoped-down test blueprint to verify the venture deployment pipeline without open-ended ideation.

invariants.invariant: CREATE DUMMY VENTURE: Create a simple 'Timestamp Service' venture blueprint. The blueprint should just have one invariant: 'Output current timestamp'. Do NOT perform any research or validation. Just create the artifact.
invariants.measurement: Verify a simple blueprint.json is created.

invariants.invariant: TEST EXECUTION BEFORE DEPLOYMENT: FOR EACH venture package created, dispatch it as a child workstream using dispatch_new_job with sample inputs. The child job will execute the venture blueprint to validate it works. You will be RE-INVOKED automatically when all children complete.

TEMPLATE REGISTRATION (AFTER RE-INVOCATION): When re-invoked with completed test children, register the venture as a template using register_template. Use priceWei='100000000000000' (0.0001 ETH) and status='hidden'.
